articles.description: There's a lot of hope and genuine excitement around the Flyers for the first time in a long time, and the players seem to see the next level they can get to.
articles.author: Nick Tricome

articles.title: Owen Tippett reveals that 'internal bleeding issue' ended his Flyers playoff run
articles.description: Tippett never played in the Carolina series, as the Flyers went on to get swept.
articles.author: Nick Tricome
